marquee · 2026-W26← all boards

now showing · marquee nº1

McLuhan said the medium is the message — the channel reshapes us more than the content it carries. In the age of generative everything, the model is the medium. The weights, the training data, the defaults: that's the message now.

after Marshall McLuhan
source Understanding Media: The Extensions of Man · Marshall McLuhan, 1964
remix Kris's running thesis that AI models are environments, not tools — see field notes on 'authored judgment in the age of generative everything.'

#mcluhan#media-theory#ai#the-medium-is-the-message#generative-ai#punk-rock-ai
